utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Uhh , I do not believe in these crazy diets you know , just everything in moderation .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I will take those to go . For the kids .

utterances.speaker: The Interviewer
utterances.text: Oh , I know what I wanted to ask you . You were on the show years ago and then they killed you off . What happened there ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It was so stupid , I said some stuff in an interview that I should not have said .

emotion_cause.span: 4_It was so stupid , I said some stuff in an interview that I should not have said .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But believe me , that is not gonna happen today .

utterances.speaker: The Interviewer
utterances.text: Understood . So , what would you say back then ?
